definition: Each BoJ 25bp rate hike simultaneously narrows carry, strengthens JPY, tightens domestic financial conditions via equity wealth effect (Nikkei-USD/JPY correlation ~0.7), and compresses the inflation expectations that justify continued normalization. Terminal rate ceiling is likely ~1.25-1.50%. August 2024 showed destabilization at merely 0.25%, though the system has since absorbed 0.75% without equivalent disruption.
evidence: Nikkei-USD/JPY correlation ~0.7 creates equity wealth channel feedback
System subsequently absorbed 0.75% without equivalent disruption
pair_3 praised this as the deeper insight versus challenger_01 decomposition
open_questions: Has the system adapted sufficiently to handle further normalization beyond 0.75%?
What is the precise terminal rate at which the paradox becomes binding?
Does forward guidance credibility affect the paradox threshold?
